/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/forex_cycles.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forex_cycles.dir/src/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forex_cycles.dir/src/test_igraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forex_cycles.dir/src/graph_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forex_cycles.dir/src/cycle_finder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forex_cycles.dir/src/services/currency_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forex_cycles.dir/src/engine/arbitrage_engine.cpp.o -o forex_cycles  /usr/local/lib/libigraph.a -lm /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
